title: High School History Courses
description: WriteAtHome offers two high school history tracks, one a classical, chronological approach and the other one follows a track followed by most schools.

title: HIgh School Literature Courses
description: WriteAtHome® literature courses are geared for students in sixth through twelfth grades

title: Middle School Literature Courses
description: WriteAtHome offers a fantastic middle school literature course to get students ready for the Great Books and an exciting new World Lit course that exposes students to works outside the Western Tradition.

title: High School Writing Courses Main
description: WriteAtHome®courses are geared for students in fourth through twelfth grades and come in three lengths: 32-week annual courses, 16-week semester courses, and 8-week workshops.

title: Middle School Writing Courses
description: WriteAtHome®courses are geared for students in fourth through twelfth grades and come in three lengths: 32-week annual courses, 16-week semester courses, and 8-week workshops.

title: English Language Arts Classes
description: We’re excited to offer complete English Language Arts classes for fourth and fifth graders this year. Each class will meet online once a week for an hour, and students will be given work to complete at home.

title: MS History Courses Main
description: Middle School online history courses for homeschoolers, charter schools from WriteAtHome.com

title: High School Writing 2, Annual
description: This thirty-two week writing class includes a timed essay, a research paper and essay writing. The class is ideal for the college-bound student. The first semester includes a variety of writing assignments that cover all four major modes of writing: narrative, descriptive, expository, and persuasive. The second semester of the course focuses on the two kinds of writing that are most important at the college level: research papers and formal, persuasive essays.
